rulings.Case Title: TELEKENEX, INC. VS. COLLABNET, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, JUNE 25, 2008 LINE 5. DEFENDANT COLLABNET, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: GRANTED. BASED ON ALL OF THE ADMSSIBLE EVIDENCE, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT THE CONTRACT IS AMBIGUOUS WITH REGARD TO THE AFFECT A REVISED SUPPLEMENT ¿ AS OPPOSED TO A SUBSEQUENT SUPPLEMENT ¿ HAS ON THE TERM OF THE CONTRACT. THE UNCONTRADICTED PAROL EVIDENCE AND PLAINTIFF'S CONDUCT SUBSEQUENT TO THE EXECUTION OF THE 2/17/05 REVISION, DEMONSTRATE THAT THE TERM WAS NOT EXTENDED. ACCORDINGLY, DEFENDANT IS ENTITLED TO SUMMARY JUDGMENT. DEFENDANT TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER AND PLAINTIFF TO PRESENT ORDER RE OBJECTIONS TO RYAN DECLARATION IN COMPLIANCE WITH C.R.C. 3.1354. =(302/PHA/PB)
